module_development(3) Library Functions Manual module_development(3)

NAME

module_development - Development & Debugging


- 🔧 Build system, testing infrastructure, and debugging utilities

SYNOPSIS

Topics


Build System
🔨 Compile human-readable code into machine-executable code Debugging
🐛 Tools to help you figure out what's going on with the code Defer Statements
🔄 Go/Zig-style defer statements for automatic cleanup in C Dependencies
⛓️ External projects we rely on Error Handling
⚠️ Thread-Local Error Number System with Context Errors
❌ When things go wrong and ending the program unsuccessfully Lock Debugging and Deadlock Detection
🔒 Lock debugging infrastructure with backtrace capture and interactive monitoring Panic Instrumentation
🚨 Per-statement logging for crash debugging in C programs Query Tool
HTTP-based runtime variable inspection using external LLDB. Tests
🧪 Unit, integration, and performance tests

Detailed Description

🔧 Build system, testing infrastructure, and debugging utilities

Build configuration, test framework, debugging tools, and lock debugging.
